description.unified: Deals Magic Damage 3 times to a random enemy and nearby enemies, stunning them for [3 sec->1.8 sec].

Creates [Belladonna Seed] in the area around the target for [10 sec->7 sec]. [Belladonna Seed]: Deals Magic Damage every [2 sec->1 sec] to nearby enemies and reduces their healing received by [30%->25%] for [5 sec->1 sec].
Deals Magic Damage 6 time to enemies in a wide area in front and knocks them down for [3 sec->1.8 sec].
On Normal and skill attacks, inflicts [Poison] on the target, dealing continuous Magic Damage every 1 sec for 20 sec and reducing their healing received by 5%. This effect stacks up to 5 times.

dark.unified: Mana cost is increased by [(added) 1000], but damage dealt is increased by [(added) 100%]. [(removed) Recovers own Mana by 250 upon a Critical Hit.]
Enemies hit suffer increased status ailment duration by 30% for [5 sec->{1} sec].

light.unified: Mana cost is increased by [1->1000], but damage dealt is increased by [100%->80%].

dark.unified: Mana cost is increased by [1->1000], but removes beneficial effects from enemies within range.
If the target is a boss, [Poison] damage is increased by [x3->70%].

description.unified: [Thornbush Forest] Increases DMG by 50% and reduces Cooldown by {0} sec.
[Wrath of the Forest] Increases DMG by {0}%. Upon a Crit Hit on enemies with 5 or more stacks of Poison, reduces Cooldown by 4%.
[Poison] makes Poison effect irremovable and increases DMG dealt to Bosses by [(added) {0}%]. [(removed) increased M.DMG taken.]

dark.unified: At the start of battle, all skill cooldowns are reduced by 30%, and damage dealt to non-hero enemies is increased by [20%->10%] for 90 sec. The damage increase stacks up to 5 times and cannot be dispelled.

description.unified: Every 7 sec, deals Magic Damage to poisoned enemies, reduces their Magic Defense by {1}% for 10 sec, and increases their Magic Damage taken by {2}%.
